title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: THE RIVER CENTER OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers overnight shelter temperatures reach 32 degrees or below. Snacks will be available. 3000 S Santiam Highway Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Age 18 and older and families with minor children. Pets allowed. Hours: Open 7 days per week when temperatures reach 32 degrees or below 7pm-7am Shelter will close at 10pm if there are zero participants (541) 451-1271 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 451-1271 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Community Shelters Community Shelters * Homeless Families Extreme Weather Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters * Homeless Families If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE RIVER CENTER
